socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a Tornado that hinders and repeatedly damages enemies around it. It will move forward for a duration, during which your projectiles can collide with it to deal damage as though it was an enemy. Then it will chase down enemies for a secondary duration, and reflect a portion of the damage it took from your projectiles to them in addition to its own damage.
explicitMods: During initial Duration, can be hit by your Projectiles up to 20 times
Reflects 10% of Damage Taken to Enemies

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a wall of force which allies and enemies can pass through, but allied projectiles which can collide with enemies will also collide with this wall, and can chain from it to other targets. Projectiles can only collide with a single Wall of Force, and no more than once.
explicitMods:
Projectiles cannot Split, Pierce, or Fork when colliding with the wall
Projectiles can Chain an additional time when colliding with the wall
Projectiles can only chain to targets on the same side of the wall
Projectiles which have collided with the wall deal 20% less Damage
Wall is destroyed after 17 Projectile collisions
